package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for builder_or_buffer_recreated_per_iteration: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: strings.Builder, bytes.Buffer, or bytes.NewBuffer(...) constructions observed inside loops instead of being reset or reused.
type CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationModel
}

type CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationService struct {
    repo *CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIteration(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIterationDTO) error {
    rows := make([]string, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items {
        var builder strings.Builder
        builder.WriteString(item.ID)
        builder.WriteByte(':')
        builder.WriteString(item.Status)
        rows = append(rows, builder.String())

        payloadCopy := bytes.NewBuffer(item.Payload)
        _ = payloadCopy.Len()
    }
    _ = rows
    return nil
}
